executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md, design.md, scopes.md with 8 scopes. Created report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json.

Reconcile-to-doc pass. Fixed: AnnotationHandlers wiring in main.go (was dead code), DeleteTag method+handler+route (missing), NATS event publishing in Store (missing), annotations config in smackerel.yaml (SST gap). 236 unit tests pass.
Audit phase: ./smackerel.sh check (config in sync, env_file drift guard OK), ./smackerel.sh lint (Go + Python clean, web manifests OK). Recorded in report.md Audit Evidence section.

Chaos phase: Honestly skipped — no spec-owned chaos harness exists for the annotation path. Annotations are deterministic CRUD with auth guard; failure modes (nil store, missing artifact, unauthorized) are covered by unit tests. Documented in report.md Chaos Evidence section.

Manual cross-check: spec.md/design.md/scopes.md aligned with implementation. All 8 scopes Done with verified file:line evidence. Annotation lifecycle (POST tag/note/highlight → store → NATS event → search/intelligence enrichment) matches spec intent.

Iter 10 trace-guard inventory only (no fixes applied). MIT-027-TRACE-001: Close 87 trace-guard failures via DoD-trace-prefix + report.md evidence references + Test Plan row additions + path corrections. Owner: bubbles.implement (parent-expanded bugfix-fastlane future iteration). Trigger: Next bubbles.goal session OR dedicated trace-cleanup sprint. Estimated effort: large (~6-8h, biggest residual). Failure breakdown: Type A (Gherkin scenario without faithful DoD): 33 — broadly distributed across Scopes 5/6/7/8 (annotation parsing, Telegram handler, mapping, search filters, intelligence integration); Type C (path-missing): 5 — scattered scopes referencing test files that need path correction; Type D (report missing evidence reference): 31 — internal/telegram/annotation_test.go (×11 Scope 6), internal/api/search_annotation_test.go (×10 Scope 7), internal/telegram/mapping_test.go (×4 Scope 5), internal/intelligence/annotations_test.go (×3 Scope 8), internal/annotation/parser_test.go (×3 Scope 2); Type E (no traceable Test Plan row): 17 — Scope 8 intelligence integration has 6 unmapped Gherkin scenarios (tag/rating/note relevance effects) plus Scope 5/6/7 scattered. Root cause: same as MIT-026-TRACE-001 — spec completed pre-traceability-guard era. Implementation tests EXIST (verified per spec-review entry above: ls confirms internal/annotation/, internal/telegram/, internal/api/, internal/intelligence/ all populated with annotation*.go and *_test.go files). The matrix between Gherkin scenarios → Test Plan rows → DoD bullets → report.md evidence references was never populated to G068 standards. Closure strategy: (1) Add `Scenario <ID or name>:` prefix to 33 DoD bullets; (2) Add 17 missing Test Plan rows pointing to existing test files in internal/intelligence/, internal/telegram/, internal/api/; (3) Bulk-add 31 evidence references in report.md citing the 5 test files listed above with their actual function lists; (4) Repoint 5 paths to existing test files. Sample fix: scopes.md Scope 8 DoD '`intelligence/annotations.go` adjusts relevance scores' → 'Scenarios "Tag annotation has small positive relevance effect" + "Rating annotation adjusts relevance score upward" + "Note annotation has small positive relevance effect" + "Low rating annotation adjusts relevance score downward" + "Interaction annotation boosts relevance" + "Relevance score does not go below 0": `intelligence/annotations.go` adjusts relevance scores per annotation type with floor at 0'; report.md Scope 6 evidence section: append 'Telegram annotation handler tests at `internal/telegram/annotation_test.go` cover SCN-027-* including TestHandleAnnotateCommand_*, TestParseAnnotationCommand_*, TestRouteAnnotationToHandler_*'. Status / certification fields untouched.

MIT-027-TRACE-001 closed. Trace-guard 87 → 0 failures; artifact-lint passes (only pre-existing scopeProgress/scopeLayout schema-deprecation warnings remain). Type A (33 DoD-trace prefixes): added 'Scenario "<name>": ' prefix to existing DoD bullets in scopes 1×1 (annotation types created by migration), 2×5 (full annotation, out-of-range rating, case-insensitive interaction, all interaction types, 'out of 5' syntax — three scenarios prefixed onto two DoD bullets that already covered them), 3×5 (NATS payload, CreateFromParsed rejects non-existent artifact, GetSummary aggregated + GetSummary error, tag add+remove), 4×5 (invalid rating + empty body share one bullet, GET summary + GET summary unannotated share one bullet, non-existent artifact), 5×2 (resolve from replied-to, multiple mappings same chat), 6×2 (plain text becomes note, /rate no args), 7×7 (tag filter, intent detection ×3 share one bullet, results include annotation data, boost adjusts ranking + boost small enough share one bullet), 8×6 (rating up/down/interaction/tag/note share one bullet, relevance does not go below 0). No DoD behavioral claim rewritten — prefixes prepended to existing text only. Type C (6 path repoints in Scope 1, not 5 as originally diagnosed — fuzzy row-matching also picked T1-06 'Migration applies cleanly' whose path internal/db/migrations_test.go was identically broken): all six T1-* rows repointed from internal/db/migrations_test.go (does not exist) → tests/integration/db_migration_test.go (real, contains TestMigrations_AllTablesExist, TestMigrations_AnnotationsConstraints, TestMigrations_IndexesExist, TestMigrations_TableDropAndRecreate, TestMigrations_SchemaVersionCount, TestMigrations_ExtensionsLoaded). Type D (report evidence): added Trace-Guard Closure section to report.md citing internal/annotation/parser_test.go, internal/telegram/mapping_test.go, internal/telegram/annotation_test.go, internal/api/search_annotation_test.go, internal/intelligence/annotations_test.go, and tests/integration/db_migration_test.go by full repo path with real test function lists. Type E (17 new Test Plan rows): T2-13..T2-20 (parser_test.go: 8 rows for parse rating/tags/tag-removal/interaction/note/out-of-range/all-interaction-types/out-of-5), T3-11 (store_test.go: CreateFromParsed converts), T4-13 (annotations_test.go: GET history), T5-06 (mapping_test.go: resolve from replied-to), T8-12..T8-17 (annotations_test.go: 6 rows for rating-up/rating-down/interaction/tag/note/no-below-0). Verification: traceability-guard 027 PASSED (70 scenarios, 103 test rows, 70 mapped to DoD, 0 unmapped); artifact-lint 027 PASSED (only pre-existing schema warnings). State.json: appended this executionHistory entry; status / certification fields untouched. No source code, test files, or production tests modified. Files modified: specs/027-user-annotations/{scopes.md, report.md, state.json}.
